column1: # PURPOSE: During last EMA_QUANT_AWARE_FRAC of training, EMA tracks simulated-quantized
#   weights (int6 for matrices, int8 for embeddings) instead of raw float weights.
#   This directly reduces the pre→post quant BPB gap. Implemented in train_gpt_sota_decoded.py.
# Baseline for comparison: mlr_floor_006_s42 quant_bpb 1.39007 (no quant-aware EMA).
# DECISION: best frac beats baseline quant_bpb by ≥0.003 → lock EMA_QUANT_AWARE_FRAC.

column2: QK_GAIN_INIT=5.5 WARMDOWN_FRAC=0.64 TTT_ENABLED=1 SLIDING_WINDOW_ENABLED=1 TTT_EPOCHS=1 EMA_DECAY=0.995 LOGIT_SOFTCAP=20 MATRIX_LR=0.006 SCALAR_LR=0.030 EMA_QUANT_AWARE_FRAC=0.05 ITERATIONS=1100 MAX_WALLCLOCK_SECONDS=5800 TIMEOUT_SECS=7200 FAST_SMOKE=0 SEED=42
